message:
Track discovered connectors even when they produce no conversation batches

Add is_discovered flag to IndexMessage::Done so the streaming consumer
records connector names that were found during scanning but yielded zero
batches. Previously these connectors were silently dropped from the
discovered list because discovery tracking only happened inside the Batch
arm.

Extract remember_discovered_connector() helper to deduplicate the
name-tracking logic across Batch and Done handlers. Gate the now
test-only next_streaming_batch() and send_conversation_batches() with
#[cfg(test)] and move the Peekable import accordingly.

Update lru crate from 0.12 to 0.16 (Cargo.lock).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
